themes.exampleQuote: One of the best sushi experiences I have ever had overall.
The price is on the higher end, but is justified by the quality of the food.
Busy, but that is to be expected.
A clearly expert chef. Classic sushi done with a modern style.
For the service, I cannot give a positive review.

notable_quote: The best sushi I have tried in Pittsburgh. One of the best sushi experiences I have ever had overall.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently single out the food quality, especially the chef's precision and the range from chirashi to modern rolls, while the recurring friction points are pricing felt as steep and service that occasionally doesn't match the kitchen.
quarter_narrative: Mola enters Spring 2026 sitting at the top of both the Pittsburgh Sushi and Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens families, carried by 767 Google reviews with an 80 percent five-star rate and a visual catalog of 935 photos that is among the strongest in its peer group. The creator fit signal is the most distinctive number on the board: Pittsburgh TikTok creators are filming the East Liberty restaurant, and the business's own social presence is running at two posts in the last 30 days and zero Reels, a gap that leaves the city's interest in Mola largely uncaptured by the restaurant itself. Holding the family lead through next issue will depend on whether the Instagram signal restarts with the kind of frequency that matches what outsiders are already saying about the place.
tldr_read: First in Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens on food quality and photo depth, with a nearly dormant Instagram and a creator story the restaurant isn't telling itself.
tldr_meaning: The floor is strong enough to hold the top rank for now, but the Instagram momentum signal sits well below the family median and the conversion path is already maxed, so the only axes with room to move are social frequency and creator capture.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Asian Kitchens On Review Depth. The Instagram Feed Hasn't Kept Pace.

playbook.headline: Post on Instagram at least weekly
playbook.action: Two posts in 30 days is well below the pace needed to hold a top rank; a consistent weekly cadence, especially Reels, would directly lift the momentum signal.

playbook.headline: Turn creator TikToks into owned content
playbook.action: Three creators have already filmed Mola this quarter with 6,590 total plays; reposting or responding to that content on Instagram closes the gap between outside interest and the business's own feed.

playbook.headline: Address service mentions before they compound
playbook.action: One service complaint in a small sample carries outsized weight; a public, specific response to the Hokkaido Uni Chirashi review would signal accountability and protect the 80 percent five-star rate.
